TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == O ngangan no Asiroay == Toso ka cinganganay to 'asiro a niyaro: i Posongay Ci'asiroay a niyaro' ato i tiniay i Donghe Siang no Taitung Asiroay a niyaro', 175 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 475 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. Adihay ko pipaloma to 'asiro (mami', 橘子), i tini ko piaalaan toya ngangan no niyaro'. 58% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 277 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 42% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 198 ko tamdaw. O pasinto no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko 'Amis 57%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Talihafan
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u asiro~uaj == to~uso~u ka ʦiŋaŋanaj to~u ʡasiro~u a nijaro~u: i po~uso~uŋaj ʦiʡasiro~uaj a nijaro~uʡ ato~u i tiniaj i ɬ~ɮo~uŋħə siaŋ no~u taito~u~uŋ asiro~uaj a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u pipaɾo~uma to~u ʡasiro~u (mamiʡ, **), i tini ko~u piaaɾaan to~uja ŋaŋan no~u nijaro~uʡ. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pasinto~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u ʡamis **%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. taɾiħafan
S.FORM: == O ngangan no Asiroay == Toso ka cinganganay to 'asiro a niyaro: i Posongay Ci'asiroay a niyaro' ato i tiniay i Donghe Siang no Taitung Asiroay a niyaro', 175 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 475 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. Adihay ko pipaloma to 'asiro (mami', 橘子), i tini ko piaalaan toya ngangan no niyaro'. 58% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 277 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 42% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 198 ko tamdaw. O pasinto no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko 'Amis 57%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Talihafan
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u asiro~uaj == to~uso~u ka ʦiŋaŋanaj to~u ʡasiro~u a nijaro~u: i po~uso~uŋaj ʦiʡasiro~uaj a nijaro~uʡ ato~u i tiniaj i ɬ~ɮo~uŋħə siaŋ no~u taito~u~uŋ asiro~uaj a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u pipaɾo~uma to~u ʡasiro~u (mamiʡ, **), i tini ko~u piaaɾaan to~uja ŋaŋan no~u nijaro~uʡ. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pasinto~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u ʡamis **%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. taɾiħafan
